name: Ariel Asura
alt_names: アリエル・アネモイ・アスラ
Second Princess of the Asura Kingdom
description: Second Princess of the Asura Kingdom. She is hardly ever seen without her two bodyguards, [Luke](https://anilist.co/character/226703) and "[Silent Fitz](https://anilist.co/character/88346)". After surviving many assassination attempts, she and her bodyguards flee to The Magic City of Sharia and enroll at  the Ranoa Magic Academy.
